_meta.purpose: Demo test cases covering all 7 ITC/reconciliation paths
_meta.note: val in gstr2b_may2026.json = taxable amount (pre-tax), so record.total = taxable+igst+cgst+sgst = invoice total_amount. This makes reconciler matching work correctly.

scenarios.demo_narrative: Invoice exactly matches GSTR-2B. GSTIN valid, HSN correct at 12%, ITC of Rs.2700 confirmed. This is the happy path - what most invoices should look like.

line_items.description: Acetate Full-Rim Spectacle Frames (Mixed assortment - round, rectangular)

scenarios.demo_narrative: Supplier printed SVLC/MAY/2026/00892 on the paper invoice but filed SVLC/MAY/2026/892 in their GSTR-1 (dropped the leading zeros). Levenshtein distance = 2. Munim catches this instead of flagging it as unmatched ITC.

line_items.description: Daily Disposable Contact Lenses - 30 lens pack (power: -1.00 to -4.00)

expected_output.reconciler_logic: Pass 2 fires: normalized 'svlcmay202600892' vs 'svlcmay2026892' = lev_dist 2, amount within 2%, date within 30 days

scenarios.demo_narrative: Royal Optica Frames (Gujarat supplier) has NOT filed their GSTR-1 for May 2026. Rs.3840 ITC is at serious risk. Munim sends proactive alert. Section 16(2)(c): ITC only available if supplier files.

line_items.description: Titanium Rimless Spectacle Frames - TR90 Flexible (Premium range)

expected_output.action: Contact Royal Optica Frames to file their GSTR-1 for May 2026

scenarios.demo_narrative: Business dinner at Woodland Residency hotel. GSTR-2B match is perfect - supplier filed. But ITC is ZERO by law. Section 17(5)(b): food & beverages are a hard block. No workaround exists. Rs.630 tax is a sunk cost.

line_items.description: Restaurant services - Business dinner for 4 persons (AC restaurant with bar)

expected_output.block_reason: Section 17(5)(b) - Restaurant/food & beverage services, ITC not available

scenarios.demo_narrative: Shree Vinayak charged 18% GST (HSN 9004) instead of correct 12%. Rs.1440 is over-charged tax - ITC on the excess is blocked because the invoice is technically wrong. Munim flags this and tells owner to ask supplier for a credit note.

line_items.description: Bifocal glass reading lenses - CR-39 optical grade (assorted powers)

expected_output.block_reason: HSN 9004 rate mismatch: 18% charged, correct rate is 12%. Excess CGST/SGST of Rs.1440 blocked.
expected_output.fix_action: Ask Shree Vinayak Spectacle Works to issue a credit note for excess tax charged

scenarios.demo_narrative: VisionTech Optical filed in GSTR-2B (looks legit) BUT: GSTIN registered only 126 days ago, this is invoice #001 (first ever), and value is Rs.4.76 lakhs. Classic ITC fraud pattern. Munim fraud score fires. Flag for CA review before claiming.

line_items.description: Premium Titanium-Acetate Eyewear Frames - Designer collection (bulk)

fraud_context.note: Inject this registration_date into GSTIN validation mock/API response for fraud signal to trigger. Signal 1 (gstin_age) fires: age < 180 days AND invoice > Rs.50,000.

expected_output.action: Do NOT claim ITC until CA verifies this supplier is genuine

scenarios.demo_narrative: Titan's ERP system generates internal reference codes (TITANB00040320). The paper invoice shows TET/NAS/0512/2026. Numbers are completely different - pass 1 and 2 both fail. But amount Rs.40320 matches within 1% AND date matches within 15 days - pass 3 fires: POSSIBLE_MATCH. CA should verify once.

line_items.description: Titan Fastrack Eyewear Collection - Assorted metal/plastic frames (bulk dealer pack)

expected_output.reconciler_logic: Pass 1 FAIL (tetnaso51220 26 vs titanb00040320, lev >> 2). Pass 2 FAIL (same). Pass 3 FIRES: amount 40320 vs 40320 within 1%, date 12-05-2026 vs 12-05-2026 within 15 days.

scenarios.demo_narrative: Arihant Optics filed their GSTR-1 for May 2026. Rs.4560 of ITC is SITTING IN GSTR-2B ready to claim. But Suryakant Optics never scanned this invoice (physically lost or forgot). Munim detects this MISSED ITC from GSTR-2B and alerts the trader. This is money left on the table.

expected_output.detection_method: find_missed_itc() in GSTR2BReconciler: record in gstr2b_records but not in processed invoice hashes
expected_output.action: Locate the physical invoice from Arihant Optics dated 02-May-2026, scan and upload to claim Rs.4560 ITC

summary.demo_talking_point: Of Rs.70,230 in total GST paid this month, Munim identified Rs.5,280 immediately recoverable, Rs.3,840 at risk (supplier not filed), and Rs.51,000 fraud-flagged. Without Munim, a small shop owner would have NO visibility into any of this.
